expectations.text: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit message shape <type>: <subject> plus trailer block.
expectations.evidence: fix: fix retry backoff for rate-limit bug

expectations.text: Uses Fixes #456 and the default Copilot trailer.
expectations.evidence:
fix: fix retry backoff for rate-limit bug

Fixes #456
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

expectations.text: Plans both push and PR creation.
Sets the PR title to the commit subject and includes the issue in the body.
expectations.evidence:
{"pr_title": "fix retry backoff for rate-limit bug", "subject": "fix retry backoff for rate-limit bug", "pr_body": "Summary:
- fix retry backoff for rate-limit bug

Issues:
Fixes #456"}
